description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Fixed Last.fm reconnect issues after cancelled authentication attempts
- Fixed invisible EQ preset text when using light accent colors
- Fixed ListenBrainz token field corner rendering issues
- Added inline validation and error messages for ListenBrainz authentication
- Added click-away focus behavior for the ListenBrainz token field
- Added multi-track metadata editing support across all major library views
- Added Apple Music-style multi-select metadata editor with Mixed value support
- Added Ctrl+A multi-select support in album track lists
- Added rename-by-pattern support to the metadata editor
- Added audio converter support for MP3, M4A, AAC, Opus, OGG, WMA, FLAC, ALAC, WAV, AIFF, and WavPack
- Added bit-depth selection for supported lossless formats
- Added option to import converted files back into the library
- Added media kind editing support in Metadata Editor
- Added ReplayGain scan status indicators for previously scanned tracks
- Added real ffmpeg validation with version detection
- Added Enter-to-validate support for ffmpeg paths
- Added ReplayGain album actions to related album sections
- Added update-available badge to the Settings sidebar icon
- Added mouse back and forward navigation support
- Added ListenBrainz integration and account management support
- Added release type detection and filtering support for albums
- Added release type override controls in Metadata Editor
- Added hover-open submenu behavior for Sort By menus
- Fixed album metadata editing only updating a single track
- Fixed album metadata opening the wrong editor mode
- Fixed multi-selection persisting across navigation
- Fixed multi-track metadata editing overwriting unchanged fields
- Fixed Folders view not updating after media folder changes
- Fixed artist name color inconsistencies on album pages
- Fixed Genre and Equalizer dropdown mouse wheel scrolling
- Fixed Album and Album Artist fields not showing Mixed values
- Fixed lyrics not appearing in Metadata Editor tabs
- Fixed artwork embedding during audio conversion
- Fixed converter overwrite conflicts when source and destination match
- Fixed Search Lyrics button visibility with light accent colors
- Fixed ffmpeg status updates lagging behind path changes
- Fixed Ctrl+A requiring an initial click before working
- Fixed ReplayGain not applying on track start
- Fixed ReplayGain tag writing issues across formats
- Fixed incorrect ReplayGain loudness calculations
- Fixed file-locking issues during ReplayGain scans
- Fixed converter and scanner count reporting races
- Fixed volume popup closing while dragging
- Fixed context menu duplication during rapid clicks
- Fixed player bar artist hover and click hit areas
- Fixed filter pill hover clipping in Albums view
- Fixed Scoop package publishing workflow
- Fixed outdated Chocolatey package metadata and installer references
- Improved audio converter metadata preservation
- Improved artwork embedding support across formats
- Improved MP4 ReplayGain support during playback
- Improved ffmpeg status feedback and error reporting
- Improved converter and ReplayGain dialog status messages
- Improved dialog layouts, button labels, and dropdown styling
- Improved queue, context menu, and options menu animations
- Improved volume popup open and close animations
- Improved playback bar and Lyrics page accent styling
- Improved GitHub and Discord button styling in Settings
- Improved Settings layout by moving About to the top
- Improved album and playlist context menu actions
- Removed beta badges from audio tools and release type features
- Removed legacy metadata editor and playlist menu code
Full Changelog: v1.1.11...v1.1.12
